name: codex-data-guardian
description: SafetyFirst rules for AI agents, packaged as a Codex plugin: limited access, explicit approval, no unapproved deletion, verify even 100 times if needed, testing, and no live changes without consent.

interface.longDescription: SafetyFirst rules for AI agents, packaged as a Codex plugin: nothing happens without explicit user approval, including access, changes, deletion, sending, publishing, or live actions. Reminds users that an AI agent is a program running in an environment, must be used with careful permission boundaries, should verify even 100 times if risk requires it, and should test, test, test first without rushing.
